channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Democratic Rep. Steve Cohen halts reelection bid after Tennessee redraws his district
item.description: Democratic Rep. Steven Cohen ends his campaign for reelection in Memphis after Tennessee's mid-decade redistricting.

item.title: Supreme Court Allows Mail-Order Abortion, Putting Women and Babies at Risk
item.description: Justice Samuel Alito criticized the court's decision, calling it an "unreasoned order" and "remarkable."

item.title: Supreme Court Approves Abortion by Mail
item.description: The frustration of the two dissenting justices is understandable.

item.title: Unlikely Alliance: Environmental Groups and Oil States Unite Against E15 Ethanol
item.description: Wyoming Republican Sen. John Barrasso and left-wing group Earthjustice share a common goal.
